sessionStart.powershell: $root = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'azure-fuse'; if (Test-Path $root) { Get-ChildItem $root -Directory | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -lt (Get-Date).AddMinutes(-30) } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $removed = (Get-ChildItem $root -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count; Write-Host "FUSE cleanup: evicted stale snapshots" }
sessionStart.bash: find "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/azure-fuse" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -mmin +30 -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo 'FUSE cleanup: evicted stale snapshots'
